The '''Blackhand Annihilator''' was a [[Slugthrower pistol/Legends|slugthrower pistol]] typically used among scoundrels and outcasts that was developed for use during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. As the developement came too late, it only saw limited use during that conflict. However, it later saw some military use during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Behind the scenes==
This pistol was looted from [[Mouf]]s in the [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] region on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Also, while the item description and the [http://starwarsgalaxies.station.sony.com/players/content.vm?id=66928&resource=features official ''Star Wars Galaxies'' website] spelled the item name "Annihilator", the item itself was erroneously named "Annihilater". However, this was later corrected.
